sections.modifyInstructions: Modify the values and click the Calculate button to use

descriptions.paymentCalcDesc: The Payment Calculator can determine the monthly payment amount or loan term for a fixed interest loan. Use the "Fixed Term" tab to calculate the monthly payment of a fixed-term loan. Use the "Fixed Payments" tab to calculate the time to pay off a loan with a fixed monthly payment.

standalone.amortizationDesc: मुफ्त | Calculate loan payments, total interest, and view annual and monthly amortization schedules.
standalone.annuityPayoutDesc: मुफ्त | Estimate the annuity payout amount for a fixed payout length or estimate the length that an annuity can last.
standalone.autoLoanDesc: मुफ्त | Calculate monthly payments, sales tax, and total costs for car loans.
standalone.creditCardsPayoffDesc: मुफ्त | Create a cost-efficient payback schedule for multiple credit cards using the Debt Avalanche method.
standalone.currencyDesc: मुफ्त | Convert currency amounts using real-time or custom exchange rates.
standalone.debtConsolidationDesc: मुफ्त | Determine whether it is financially rewarding to consolidate debts by comparing current debts with a consolidation loan.
standalone.estateTaxDesc: मुफ्त | Estimate federal estate tax due based on assets, liabilities, and lifetime gifted amounts.
standalone.houseAffordabilityDesc: मुफ्त | Estimate an affordable purchase amount for a house based on household income or fixed monthly budgets.
standalone.incomeTaxDesc: मुफ्त | Estimate the refund or potential owed amount on a federal tax return.
standalone.interestRateDesc: मुफ्त | Determine real interest rates on loans with fixed terms and monthly payments.
standalone.mortgageDesc: मुफ्त | Estimate the monthly payment due along with other financial costs associated with mortgages.
standalone.paymentDesc: मुफ्त | Determine the monthly payment amount or loan term for a fixed interest loan.
standalone.rentDesc: मुफ्त | Estimate the affordable monthly rental spending amount based on income and debt level.
standalone.salaryDesc: मुफ्त | Convert salary amounts to their corresponding values based on payment frequency.
standalone.socialSecurityDesc: मुफ्त | Determine the ideal age at which a person should apply for Social Security retirement benefits.
standalone.studentLoanDesc: मुफ्त | Estimate monthly payments, repayment schedules, and total interest for federal and private student loans.

about.metaTitle: हमारे बारे में - मुफ्त ऑनलाइन कैलकुलेटर
about.metaDescription: वित्त, स्वास्थ्य, गणित और अधिक के लिए हमारे मुफ्त ऑनलाइन कैलकुलेटर संग्रह के बारे में जानें।
about.title: हमारे कैलकुलेटर संग्रह के बारे में
about.intro: We provide a comprehensive suite of free online calculators designed to help you make informed decisions in various aspects of life.

categories.financial: {bold}Financial Calculators{/bold}: Mortgage, loans, investments, retirement, and business calculations
categories.health: {bold}Health & Fitness Calculators{/bold}: BMI, BMR, calorie tracking, pregnancy, and wellness metrics
categories.math: {bold}Math & Conversion Calculators{/bold}: Scientific calculations, unit conversions, statistics, and mathematical tools
categories.specialized: {bold}Specialized Calculators{/bold}: Date/time, automotive, construction, and other practical tools

about.privacy: All calculators are designed with accuracy, ease of use, and privacy in mind. No personal data is collected or stored when using our tools.
about.continuous: We're constantly adding new calculators and improving existing ones based on user feedback and evolving needs.
about.missionText: To empower everyone with free, accurate, and easy-to-use calculation tools that help make better decisions in finance, health, education, and daily life.

contact.metaDescription: JDCALC टीम से संपर्क करें। हम आपकी प्रतिक्रिया और सुझावों का स्वागत करते हैं।
contact.title: संपर्क करें
contact.intro: Have feedback, suggestions, or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you.

privacy.metaDescription: हमारी गोपनीयता नीति बताती है कि हम आपके डेटा को कैसे संभालते हैं जब आप हमारे मुफ्त ऑनलाइन कैलकुलेटर टूल का उपयोग करते हैं।
privacy.title: गोपनीयता नीति
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy outlines how we handle your information when you use our calculator tools.
privacy.dataCollectionText: Our calculators run entirely in your browser. Any numbers you enter are processed locally and are never sent to our servers. We do not collect, store, or share any calculation inputs.
privacy.cookiesText: We use minimal cookies necessary for site functionality (e.g., theme preference). No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.thirdPartiesText: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this policy, please contact us.

terms.metaTitle: सेवा की शर्तें - मुफ्त ऑनलाइन कैलकुलेटर
terms.metaDescription: हमारे मुफ्त ऑनलाइन कैलकुलेटर टूल का उपयोग करने के लिए नियम और शर्तें।
terms.title: सेवा की शर्तें
terms.intro: By using our calculator tools, you agree to these terms of service.
terms.useOfServicesText: Our calculators are provided for informational and educational purposes only. Results are estimates and should not replace professional advice in financial, medical, legal, or other matters.
terms.accuracyText: We strive for accuracy but make no guarantees. Always verify critical calculations with a qualified professional.
terms.availabilityText: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any calculator tool at any time without notice.
